case_title: JON FOUGNER VS. A. TAMAM CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FOUGNER, JON AS TO DEFENDANT A. TAMAM CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOUGNER, JON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A. TAMAM CONSTRUCTION INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $219.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,719.00, FOR CALL ON SEPTEMBER 25, 2017 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: AVI TAMAM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOUGNER, JON AS TO DEFENDANT A. TAMAM CONSTRUCTION INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FILED CORRECTED PROOF OF SERVICE - PROOF AMENDED AS TO TIME OF SERVICE. (FEE FOR SERVICE WAS $129.00) SERVED DEC-28-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT A. TAMAM CONSTRUCTION INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF JON FOUGNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT A. TAMAM CONSTRUCTION INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
